Tests if the type of negative infinity is a number.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion that checks the type of the JavaScript value `-Infinity`. It uses the `assert` function to verify that the type of `-Infinity` is `'number'`. This is a narrow functionality script, likely used for testing or validation purposes to ensure that the JavaScript environment correctly identifies `-Infinity` as a number type. The code does not include any additional logic or functionality beyond this single assertion.
